nasb.text: and there will be great earthquakes, and in various places plagues and famines; and there will be terrors and great signs from heaven.

esv.text: There will be great earthquakes, and in various places famines and pestilences. And there will be terrors and great signs from heaven.

cnv.text: 必有大地震，到處有饑荒和瘟疫，天上必有又恐怖又巨大的預兆。

ccb.text: 将有大地震，各处将有饥荒和瘟疫，天上也将出现恐怖的景象和大异兆。

csbs.text: 到处都会有大地震、饥荒和瘟疫；会有恐怖的景象和天上来的大征兆。
